summary: Classified five open live-inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected, no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed, and each open PR remains a maintainer/review/proof decision rather than backlog cleanup.

actions.reason: Needs maintainer product/config judgment and real LINE behavior proof before any merge path; this inventory job cannot fix, merge, or close it.
Needs maintainer correctness/review decision on the sqlite-vec Windows retry and the remaining ClawSweeper compatibility concern; this job cannot repair or merge it.
Needs maintainer provider/session-state correctness judgment plus real provider proof before merge consideration.
Needs maintainer product/availability judgment and review-finding resolution; this job cannot produce a fix artifact or merge path.
Needs maintainer review of the post-feedback Signal implementation, conflict/check status, and live Signal proof before merge consideration.

needs_human: #68197: maintainer product/config-contract review and real LINE behavior proof required.
